title: Google brings Gemini personal intelligence to India, here is everything you can do with it
description: Google’s artificial intelligence platform has rolled out its Personal Intelligence in India. The feature was previously introduced in the US and Japan. It allows users to connect multiple apps to Gemini, enabling more personalised and context-aware responses.
content: Artificial intelligence is set to understand you better and deliver responses tailored to your needs. Google’s AI assistant, Gemini, has now introduced a Personal Intelligence feature in India that aims to do just that. The addition allows users to c... [2021 chars]

title: Military College Of Telecommunication Engineering Wins Army Digitisation Excellence Award
description: Officials said the initiative aims to build a comprehensive and reliable database to support artificial intelligence-driven decision-making systems. Such advancements are expected to improve operational efficiency and strengthen strategic planning capabilities. content:

title: ASML's AI-Driven Surge: A Promising Revenue Outlook for 2026
description: ASML, a leading supplier of chipmaking equipment, reported better-than-expected earnings and raised its 2026 revenue forecast. The surge in artificial intelligence demand is driving higher sales expectations. ASML's high-value EUV lithography tools are critical for advanced chip manufacturing, making it a pivotal player in the tech industry.
content: ASML, the largest global supplier of chipmaking equipment, has announced first-quarter earnings surpassing expectations, alongside an optimistic revenue forecast for 2026. This positive outlook is attributed to the escalating demand for advanced chip... [833 chars]

title: Natural Ozempic, No Side Effects: Stanford Scientists Discover Peptide That Can Rival The GLP-1 Drug
description: One of the most fascinating aspects of this discovery is the role of artificial intelligence. Researchers developed a tool called "Peptide Predictor" to scan all human protein-coding genes.

description: The move forms one of the biggest tests yet of creditor sentiment toward the Japanese conglomerate's debt-fueled push further into artificial intelligence.
